mapper.sql: select cs.sno, cs.cno, cs.semester, cs.normal_score, cs.test_score, s.sname, c.cname, CONCAT(cs.sno, '-', cs.cno) as id from courseselection cs left join student s on cs.sno = s.sno left join course c on cs.cno = c.cno
mapper.select:
and cs.sno like concat('%', #{sno}, '%') and cs.cno like concat('%', #{cno}, '%') and cs.semester like concat('%', #{semester}, '%')
order by cs.sno, cs.cno

select cs.sno, cs.cno, cs.semester, cs.normal_score, cs.test_score, s.sname, c.cname, CONCAT(cs.sno, '-', cs.cno) as id from courseselection cs left join student s on cs.sno = s.sno left join course c on cs.cno = c.cno left join class cl on c.cno = cl.cno
cl.tno = #{tno} and cs.sno like concat('%', #{sno}, '%') and cs.cno like concat('%', #{cno}, '%') and cs.semester like concat('%', #{semester}, '%')
order by cs.sno, cs.cno
mapper.insert:
insert into courseselection
sno, cno, semester, normal_score, test_score,
values
#{sno}, #{cno}, #{semester}, #{normalScore}, #{testScore},
mapper.delete: delete from courseselection where sno = #{param1} and cno = #{param2}
mapper.select: select cno as "cno", cname as "cname", credit as "credit", course_type as "courseType", dept_name as "deptName", teacher_name as "teacherName", class_time as "classTime", semester as "semester", enrolled_count as "enrolledCount", avg_score as "avgScore" from v_course_enrollment order by cno

select sno as "sno", sname as "sname", cno as "cno", cname as "cname", semester as "semester", normal_score as "normalScore", test_score as "testScore", total_score as "totalScore" from v_fail_students order by sno

select tno as "tno", tname as "tname", cno as "cno", cname as "cname", semester as "semester", class_time as "classTime", dept_name as "deptName" from v_teacher_schedule where tno = #{tno} order by semester, cno
select count(*) from courseselection where sno = #{sno} and cno = #{cno}
